updateElements.mainHeader: Your Mac requires a security update
updateElements.subHeader: A friendly reminder from your IT team
updateElements.mainContentHeader: Your device will restart during this update
updateElements.mainContentSubHeader: Please save all your work before clicking Update Device
updateElements.mainContentNote: **Important:** Updates help protect company data and keep your Mac secure
updateElements.mainContentText:
A macOS update is available for your Mac. Keeping your operating system up to date is essential for security and performance.

Click **Update Device** to open Software Update, then follow the on-screen instructions.

If you need help, contact IT support.
